text: The onboarding was quick and the dashboard is easy to understand.
Support resolved my billing question within an hour.
Reports are useful, but exporting them takes too many steps.
The product works as expected. I have not used the analytics yet.
The mobile experience is slow and sometimes loses my changes.
I cannot find a way to filter results by customer segment.
Weekly summaries save our team several hours of manual work.
Setup documentation needs clearer examples for integrations.
